label.description: Display label for the KPI card. Use 'label', NOT 'title'

valueColumn.description: Column name for the main KPI value

aggregation.description: How to aggregate multi-row results into a single value (default: 'first')

autoTrend.description: Auto-calculate trend % by comparing last 2 rows. Also auto-populates sparkline from all rows

periodLabel.description: Trend display label, e.g. 'vs last month'

trendValueColumn.description: LEGACY: Column with pre-computed trend number. Use autoTrend instead when possible

sparklineXColumn.description: LEGACY: Column for sparkline x-axis labels (time-ordered)

sparklineYColumn.description: LEGACY: Column for sparkline y-axis values (numeric)

sparklineSortColumn.description: LEGACY: Column to sort sparkline rows by

sparklineSortDirection.description: LEGACY: Sort direction for sparkline rows
